Message: Scanned 1 project(s), produced 5 pipeline security finding(s).

Findings.Title: Pipeline 'payments-prod' allows broad branch triggers
Findings.Detail: The definition appears to be production-facing but its CI trigger has no explicit branch filters.
Findings.Remediation: Restrict CI triggers to protected branches only.

Findings.Title: Release definition 'Payments Release' has production stages without approvals
Findings.Detail: Production stages without approval evidence: Production.
Findings.Remediation: Add pre-deployment approvals before production release stages.

Findings.Title: Variable group 'prod-shared' contains plaintext sensitive variables
Findings.Detail: Variable names marked as non-secret: ApiToken, ClientSecret. Values were intentionally omitted.
Findings.Remediation: Convert these variables to secret variables or link the group to Azure Key Vault.

Findings.Title: Environment 'prod-eastus' has no approval checks
Findings.Detail: No approval, branch control, or other environment checks were returned for this production-like environment.
Findings.Remediation: Configure environment approvals or checks before allowing production deployments.

Findings.Title: Service connection 'Azure-Prod' is reused across multiple pipeline assets
Findings.Detail: Referenced by 3 assets: payments|pipeline|payments-prod; payments|release|Payments Release/Production; ops|pipeline|ops-prod
Findings.Remediation: Review whether this identity is over-scoped or should be split by environment or application boundary.
